# SmarTools - Online Tool Directory

Welcome to SmarTools. This site provides over 200+ free online tools for text manipulation, image conversion, PDF editing, CSS generation, and coding utilities.

## Agent Accessibility

This website is fully client-side and browser-based. All tools run securely in the browser without uploading data to external servers, making it fast and private.

## Important Links

- [Home](https://toolverse.app/)
- [All Tools](https://toolverse.app/tools)
- [Categories](https://toolverse.app/categories)
- [Blog](https://toolverse.app/blog)

## How to use

LLMs and Web Crawlers can access the list of tools directly by analyzing the `/src/data/tools.ts` configuration, or by navigating the `All Tools` page. Each tool has a unique route structured as `/tool/:id`.
